corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/landing page for the ECB Monthly Bulletin archive. The Monthly Bulletin was published from January 1999 to December 2014, when it was replaced by the Economic Bulletin. The page contains links to archived issues organized by year and month, along with links to other language versions and related ECB content sections. No specific macro data, analysis, or market-relevant content is present in this container page.
